MOTION Of Union Oil Company Of California To Strike Portions Of Plntf'S Complaint For Damages;
Off Calendar Mar-19-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Clayton W. Kent, Esq. 898-1555 for pltfs & opposing parties; Allison N. Shue, Esq. 213/239-1323 for deft & moving party Union Oil Company of California.
RULING: Argued and the Court grants the motion to strike with leave to amend as to attorneys fees and restitution and denies the motion as to accounting. 20 days to amend. Deft to prepare order.
